scripts.check: npm run web:build && npm run test
scripts.train:smoke: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/train_doc_layout_smoke.py --epochs 3
scripts.train:full: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/train_full_ai_stack.py --epochs 30
scripts.train:micro-vlm: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/train_plan2field_micro_vlm.py
scripts.train:vlm-primary: HF_HOME=${HF_HOME:-/SSD/guest/chojoonghui/hf_cache} CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/train_plan2field_vlm_primary.py
scripts.bench:vlm-primary: HF_HOME=${HF_HOME:-/SSD/guest/chojoonghui/hf_cache} CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/benchmark_plan2field_vlm_primary.py
scripts.train:vlm: HF_HOME=${HF_HOME:-/SSD/guest/chojoonghui/hf_cache} CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/train_internvl35_lora.py
scripts.train:vlm:open: HF_HOME=${HF_HOME:-/SSD/guest/chojoonghui/hf_cache} CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/train_internvl35_lora.py --dataset data/processed/buili_vlm_plus_open/sft_dataset.jsonl --out-dir data/artifacts/buili_internvl35_14b_plus_open_lora
scripts.eval:vlm: HF_HOME=${HF_HOME:-/SSD/guest/chojoonghui/hf_cache} CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/evaluate_internvl35_adapter.py
scripts.eval:vlm:open: HF_HOME=${HF_HOME:-/SSD/guest/chojoonghui/hf_cache} CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=7 conda run -n cjh_buili python ml/evaluate_internvl35_adapter.py --dataset data/processed/buili_vlm_plus_open/sft_dataset.jsonl --adapter-dir data/artifacts/buili_internvl35_14b_plus_open_lora --out data/artifacts/buili_internvl35_14b_plus_open_lora/generation_qa.json
